$comment: The parity CERTIFICATE schema and its result-state $ref closure are DISTRIBUTED verbatim from the spec repo (spec is the source of truth for the parity semantics). These schemas are shipped byte-for-byte so external consumers (e.g. greenfield XG-6) validate against the real frozen parity-cert schema instead of a hand-rolled, repo-owned proof cert. The per-file sha256 below pins the exact spec source bytes; because the copy is verbatim, source sha == shipped sha, and the shipped-file digest is re-checked by the contract test suite.

ref_closure.$comment: certificate.schema.json's only outward $refs target result-state.schema.json#/$defs/{result_state,dimension_result}; result-state.schema.json uses internal #/$defs refs only. The transitive $ref closure is therefore exactly these two files. portal-payload / kind-alignment / waiver / permitted-freedom-vocab are NOT in the closure and are deliberately not distributed here.
